free_text: Elastic scattering of 16O by even mass nickel isotopes
FSU model S-FN tandem Van de Graaff
Oxygen beam from 36 to 56 MeV
Isotopically enriched nickel metal targets of 30 to
80 microg/cm2 thickness deposited into thin carbon
backing.
8 to 16 Si surface barrier detectors of 100
microm depletion depth
While numerical data for incident energies between 40
and 56 MeV were obtained from authors, the figures in
the Phys.Rev. article show also data for 36 and 38 MeV
(which show almost no angular dependence). (Compiler)
